R to @NetramDefence: A key feature of this collaboration is the “shared reserve model,” wherein Abu Dhabi National Oil Company (ADNOC) stores crude oil in India’s SPR facilities while retaining ownership, but India has the first right to access these reserves during emergencies.

 This mechanism allows India to strengthen its strategic reserves without fully bearing procurement costs. The agreement also expands storage beyond Mangalore to include Visakhapatnam and planned facilities at Chandikhol in Odisha, while exploring storage in the UAE itself, including Fujairah. 

In parallel, ADNOC has expanded its engagement with Indian Oil Corporation to explore long-term LPG supply and trading opportunities, building on an existing term contract since 2023.
